title: Pseudotime estimation: deconfounding single cell time series.
author: Reid JE Wernisch L
content:
S-EPMC5039927 PMC5039927 Pseudotime estimation: deconfounding single cell time series.

Motivation

Repeated cross-sectional time series single cell data confound several sources of variation, with contributions from measurement noise, stochastic cell-to-cell variation and cell progression
